title: Implement trls accept-citation command with interactive confirmation and --ci flag
definition_of_done: trls accept-citation --issue ID --rationale TEXT emits citation-accepted op; rationale must be >=3 words; --ci bypasses interactive prompt; TestAcceptCitationCmd_CI_HappyPath, TestAcceptCitationCmd_RationaleTooShort, TestAcceptCitationCmd_TwoWords_Rejected, TestAcceptCitationCmd_ThreeWords_Accepted, TestAcceptCitationCmd_MissingIssue, TestAcceptCitationCmd_MissingRationale pass; make check green
